items.title: LEADERSHIP
items.description: My experience allows me to bring expertise to brand management positions. I’ve owned total brand proposition for challenger and legacy brands, leading external teams and internal colleagues to produce content, activate campaigns and launch collaborations.

items.title: OMNI CHANNEL CAMPAIGNS
items.description: From digital-first social campaigns and in-person activations, to packaging and POS, I’m passionate about delivering truly seamless campaign experiences that immerse the customer in brand personality — at every touchpoint.

items.title: CONTENT PRODUCTION
items.description: Podcasting. Short and long form video. Script writing. Blog production. And more. End-to-end content production is the foundation of my work. From planning to set management, to editing, I have honed my skills over the course of my career.
